user_goal: 在 B017 经验签收（B015 regime-aware activation 不缩窄 B013 vs 60/40 gap；B016 HRP 不缩窄 B010 vs 60/40 gap，HRP -$496 + turnover +41%）之后，做 gap root-cause attribution 批次：用 B014 真实 yfinance snapshot 量化 B013 与 B010 vs static 60/40 的 absolute-return gap 来源，按资产 / 按策略 layer（L1 / L2 / L3 / defensive routing）做归因，并跨三轴做参数 sensitivity sweep（vol_target {5,8,10,12,15}% × universe ablation 4-5 variant × rebalance cadence 3-4 variant）；输出诊断报告含至少 3 个 Pareto-style 配置推荐（low-DD / balanced / high-return 带具体 trade-off 数字）。**B018 不修改任何 strategy / spec / 测试默认参数**（任何 retune 候选只入 backlog）。保留 fixture/mock-first 默认 CI、纯 stdlib trade/ 模块（无 scipy/numpy/pandas/sklearn）、no-live/no-secret-in-strategy/no-broker/no-paper/no-AI guards。

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-15 B018 planning: B017 done wrap-up closed with two negative findings (B015 regime activation policy did NOT shrink B013 gap; B016 HRP did NOT shrink B010 gap). Planner did MVP analysis vs PRD §10/§11/§4/§12 — concluded MVP is functionally complete (5/6 §12 milestones done, last one is Broker Adapter Paper which crosses §5 non-MVP line). Identified the B017 negative findings as a research debt: gap source between B013/B010 and static 60/40 remains unknown despite the two excluded hypotheses. User selected option 1 (推荐方向 B018 Gap root-cause attribution). Decisions captured: (1) mixed batch (2 generator F001-F002 + 3 codex F003-F005); (2) new analysis modules under trade/analysis/, pure stdlib like rest of trade/ (no scipy/numpy/pandas/sklearn); (3) parameter sweep covers vol_target ∈ {0.05, 0.08, 0.10, 0.12, 0.15} + universe ablation (full / drop_SGOV / drop_stabilizers / SPY+IEF / SPY only) + cadence (monthly / quarterly / semiannual / annual); (4) override configs constructed inline, NEVER mutate strategy defaults; (5) diagnostic report with at least 3 Pareto-style recommendations with concrete trade-off numbers; (6) B018 does NOT modify B010/B013/B011/B015/B016 defaults — any retune is a follow-up batch candidate; (7) backwards-compat: existing tests unchanged; (8) manifest-absent fallback: synthetic 9-asset fixture + skipped semantics; (9) reports research-only. Wrote B018 spec and features.json (5 features). Status moved to building for Generator F001.
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-15 B018 F001 done. trade/analysis/ package created (with __init__.py). trade/analysis/pnl_attribution.py implements pure-stdlib (math/statistics/dataclasses/typing/collections.abc — verified by mypy strict files=['trade'] clean): PeriodAttribution + AttributionInput + AttributionReport dataclasses; B010_LAYERS=('l2_vol_scaling','defensive_routing') and B013_LAYERS=('l1_gating','l2_vol_scaling','l3_crisis_cut','defensive_routing'). Public API: compute_per_asset_contribution (signed dollar contribution to strategy total return per asset; signed by w*r*capital), compute_per_layer_contribution (per-period per-layer dollar attribution = capital * parked_fraction * (defensive_return - avg_risk_return); defensive_routing reads base_defensive_share, other layers read parked_by_layer dict), attribution_summary (combined report), compute_period_asset_returns (helper from prices_by_symbol + boundary tuples using at-or-before observation lookup). Edge cases: zero-capital periods skipped, missing returns treated as 0, missing benchmark dates fall back to starting_capital, no defensive asset → defensive_return=0, empty input → zero-filled layers / empty per_asset / total_gap=0. Sign-of-attribution: avg_risk excludes defensive_asset from weight-weighted baseline (otherwise heavy SGOV would flip the sign). benchmark_curve parameter kept on per-layer-contribution signature for API parity even though the current strategy-internal formulation does not consume it. Tests in tests/unit/test_pnl_attribution.py (23 tests): per-asset positive/negative/multi-period/zero-capital/missing-return/single-asset/empty; per-layer B010 drag / B013 each-layer-signed / defensive_routing uses base_defensive_share / sum-approximately-matches-total-gap in canned aligned case / empty / zero-capital; attribution_summary total_gap / missing-benchmark-dates / no-periods / strategy label; helper compute_period_asset_returns at-or-before/omits-missing/pre-history-target; defensive filter / no-defensive-asset / per-asset sum matches strategy_ending - capital. Full sweep: 549 tests PASS (526 prior + 23 new), mypy strict clean, ruff clean (trade+tests), compileall clean. Next: F002 parameter sweep harness.
